message:
refactor(websocket): replace Vec with VecDeque for pending pongs

Switch pending_pongs from Vec<Bytes> to VecDeque<Bytes> to eliminate
O(n) remove(0) calls when draining pongs in FIFO order. VecDeque's
pop_front() is O(1) amortized, which matters under Ping flooding
where up to 16 pongs can accumulate before the cap triggers a clear.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
